problem: A bookstore has a sale on days of the month that are multiples of 5 (such as June 5, June 10...). A shoe store has a sale every 6 days. The shoe store has a sale on July 3. How many times in July do the two stores have sales on the same date?

classified_questions.question: Can you list the days in July when the bookstore has a sale?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: Can you list the days in July when the shoe store has a sale?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Are there any days that appear on both lists?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How many times do the bookstore and the shoe store have sales on the same date in July?
classified_questions.label: b
